text: Balthasar, let us go through your PR on the mesh routing fallback.
Sure. The main change is in the retry handler. When a node drops out mid-route, we now cascade to the next available.
I see. What happens if all nodes in a partition are down?
That is the edge case I flagged. Right now it returns a timeout. I think we should queue and retry.
Queue and retry makes sense. Set a cap at three retries with exponential backoff.
Got it. I will update the PR today. Also, the test coverage is at 94 percent for the routing module.
Good. Push it up to 97 if you can. This is going into the investor demo.
The demo? Is that the Prince Escalus review Rosaline mentioned?
Yes. Verona Ventures wants to see our mesh routing in action. Make sure the fallback is bulletproof.
Understood. I will also add a circuit breaker pattern for cascading failures.
Great thinking. Ship that by end of day and I will merge it before the Friar Lawrence review.
On it. Thanks for the guidance, Romeo.
